label: Protect from fire
description: Plantation economic asset - reduce fire damage (silviculture hints)

label: Wetlands - assess locally
description: Peat/wetland: fire-dependent AND ground-fire hazard; needs local hydrology/peat-depth/fire-history judgement rather than a screening verdict

label: Treat fire risk for people
description: High WFE near people (high WRTC Housing Unit Risk); mechanical fuels reduction + home hardening / defensible-space inspections

label: Ecosystem health focus
description: High WFE away from people (low people or on PAD); beneficial/prescribed fire in fire-adapted systems

label: Defer / monitor
description: Low WFE or no feasible outlet - not a current treatment target (excluded from Goldilocks)

label: Silvicultural treatment (HINT)
description: TREATMENT_HINT: non-commercial thinning through commercial harvest; ecosystem-specific

label: Silviculture then fire (HINT)
description: TREATMENT_HINT: thin/harvest first when needed for safe or effective fire

label: Fuels reduction + home hardening (HINT)
description: TREATMENT_HINT: mechanical fuels reduction plus home hardening / defensible-space inspections near homes (fire-excluded WUI)
